positive: A stylized, intricate celestial forest scene, featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna among massive, ancient tree roots. The main subject is a composition of stylized woodland creatures (e.g., stylized fox, deer, owl) intertwined with glowing vines and geometric constellations. The style should be neo-art deco meets mystical folklore illustration, characterized by clean, bold lines and rich, saturated jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple, gold accents). Emphasis on high contrast between glowing elements and deep shadows. Central, symmetrical composition, suitable for repeating patterns or large apparel prints. Flat lay perspective, clean silhouettes, vector illustration quality.
